summary: Tested SSO integration for Okta and Auth0. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All SSO buttons present and clickable. CRITICAL ISSUE: Okta redirect_uri still NOT registered in Okta dashboard - redirect returns 400 Bad Request.

integration_issues.issue: Okta returns 400 Bad Request - redirect_uri not registered in Okta dashboard
integration_issues.notes: Backend correctly generates URL with redirect_uri=https://verify-docs-7.preview.emergentagent.com/auth/okta/callback but this URL is NOT registered in Okta's application settings

action_items: CRITICAL: User must add 'https://verify-docs-7.preview.emergentagent.com/auth/okta/callback' to Okta Dashboard > Applications > NotaryChain > Sign-in redirect URIs
critical_code_review_comments: Good: Backend correctly generates Okta auth URL with proper redirect_uri
Good: Auth0 and Okta status endpoints correctly report configured: true
Good: SSO providers endpoint lists both Auth0 and Okta
Good: Frontend has all three SSO buttons with proper data-testid attributes
Good: OktaCallback page renders correctly and handles missing params gracefully
Good: Auth0Callback page renders correctly and handles missing params gracefully
Good: Regular login flow with admin credentials works correctly
Issue: Okta redirect_uri mismatch - needs dashboard configuration update
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) All SSO backend endpoints working correctly. 2) Okta redirect_uri is correctly generated as 'https://verify-docs-7.preview.emergentagent.com/auth/okta/callback'. 3) Auth0 redirect_uri is 'https://verify-docs-7.preview.emergentagent.com/auth/callback'. 4) BLOCKING ISSUE: Okta dashboard has NOT been updated with the new redirect URI - Okta returns 400 Bad Request. 5) User must manually update Okta dashboard settings.

sso_providers.result: Returns both Auth0 and Okta providers

okta_callback_page.notes: Renders correctly, handles missing params gracefully

auth0_callback_page.notes: Renders correctly, handles missing params gracefully

okta_redirect_uri_issue.error: 400 Bad Request - The 'redirect_uri' parameter must be a Login redirect URI in the client app settings
okta_redirect_uri_issue.required_action: Add 'https://verify-docs-7.preview.emergentagent.com/auth/okta/callback' to Okta Dashboard > Applications > NotaryChain > Sign-in redirect URIs
okta_redirect_uri_issue.root_cause: App was forked to new environment (okta-flow-test) but Okta dashboard still has old redirect URIs
